_example._comment: EXAMPLE — never rendered. Chapters in reverse chronological order (latest first). Set current: true for your active institution only.
_example.story: A short narrative about this chapter.

footerNote: Pursuing B.E. Computer Science (AI) — expected graduation 2026

chapters.story: The point where curiosity became engineering practice. Algorithms, systems, AI, and security stopped being abstract subjects and started becoming tools I could actually ship with.
A strict bridge between school and engineering. Physics, chemistry, mathematics, and computer science made the work sharper, faster, and less dependent on mood.
The chapter where science and mathematics started feeling personal. Not just marks, but the first real sense that difficult things could be understood if I stayed with them.
Small classrooms, simple routines, and the first habit of showing up. This is where the academic trail starts: curiosity before strategy, practice before polish.
